WhyItMatters: Looks for campaign-scale patterns such as sender volume spikes, many-recipient targeting, malicious attachment campaigns, spoofing, and spray-and-pray delivery.
ReviewSteps: Determine whether suspicious email activity is isolated or campaign-scale.
Review sender, domain, subject, recipient count, URLs, and attachments.
Identify delivered messages and affected recipients.
Pivot campaign indicators into Email & URL Activity Review.
Determine blast radius and remediation need.
ExpectedResults: Rows show campaign-style email patterns, repeated infrastructure, or broad targeting.
NoResultsMeaning: No campaign-style email telemetry was returned for the selected window.
RecommendedActions: Purge delivered malicious messages when validated.
Investigate users who clicked or executed payloads.
